untranslatable_reason: High and Tight Flags pattern requires detection of multi-candle chart pattern geometry (flag formation, consolidation range, prior trend strength, breakout direction). This requires pattern recognition beyond point-in-time indicator values. Specific untranslatable conditions: (1) 'Pattern forms after strong uptrend' - requires trend detection and amplitude measurement across multiple bars; (2) 'Price consolidates in tight narrow range' - requires identification of flag rectangle geometry and width comparison; (3) 'Breakout occurs in prior trend direction' - requires breakout detection from pattern boundaries; (4) 'Short or narrow patterns preferred' - requires pattern dimension measurements; (5) 'Throwback pullback detection' - requires post-breakout price action pattern analysis. These are structural pattern properties that cannot be expressed as simple indicator threshold rules.
translation_notes: This signal describes a technical chart pattern (flag) that requires visual/geometric pattern recognition. The entry conditions describe pattern formation characteristics (consolidation, trend prior, breakout), not indicator crossovers. Exit is partially translatable using trend reversal (close below MA), but the full semantics (throwbacks, pattern dimensions, trend ratio) cannot be captured with point-in-time indicators. A pattern-recognition library or specialized candle analysis would be required for proper implementation.
